name: yunxiao-bug-export
description: 导出 Yunxiao 缺陷列表、详情、截图和按日期归档的 Markdown/JSON 制品。

interface.shortDescription: 导出 Yunxiao Bug 为本地制品
interface.longDescription: 安装后可使用 yunxiao-bug-export 技能，把 Yunxiao 项目缺陷导出为按日期分组的 JSON、Markdown 和截图制品。依赖 alibabacloud-devops-mcp-server 与 Yunxiao 访问配置。
defaultPrompt: Use $yunxiao-bug-export to export unresolved bugs from a Yunxiao project into dated local artifacts.
Use $yunxiao-bug-export to fetch current Yunxiao bug details and group them by status.
Use $yunxiao-bug-export to export Yunxiao bugs with screenshots and reusable Markdown files.
